notableEvents.label: Kazuma Okamoto plunked
notableEvents.detail: Kazuma Okamoto hit by pitch. Vladimir Guerrero Jr. to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: George Springer pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: George Springer grounds out, third baseman Graham Pauley to first baseman Christopher Morel.

notableEvents.label: George Springer pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: George Springer grounds out, shortstop Otto Lopez to first baseman Graham Pauley.

notableEvents.label: Stolen base
notableEvents.detail: Blue Jays challenged (tag play), call on the field was upheld: Xavier Edwards steals (7) 2nd base.

notableEvents.label: Kyle Stowers GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Kyle Stowers grounds into a double play, second baseman Ernie Clement to shortstop Andrés Giménez to first baseman Vladimir Guerrero Jr. Otto Lopez out at 2nd. Kyle Stowers out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Kyle Stowers rally-killer GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Kyle Stowers grounds into a double play, second baseman Ernie Clement to shortstop Andrés Giménez to first baseman Vladimir Guerrero Jr. Otto Lopez out at 2nd. Kyle Stowers out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Liam Hicks GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Liam Hicks grounds into a double play, second baseman Ernie Clement to shortstop Andrés Giménez to first baseman Vladimir Guerrero Jr. Xavier Edwards out at 2nd. Liam Hicks out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Stolen base
notableEvents.detail: Marlins challenged (tag play), call on the field was overturned: Otto Lopez steals (10) 2nd base.

notableEvents.label: Heriberto Hernández pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Heriberto Hernández singles on a ground ball to center fielder Daulton Varsho.
